inputs.label: Initial Balance
inputs.businessContext: The starting balance of the annuity, if already invested.

inputs.label: Annual Contribution
inputs.businessContext: The amount added to the annuity each year.

inputs.label: Investment Period
inputs.businessContext: Number of years the annuity will grow.

inputs.label: Expected Annual Return
inputs.businessContext: The average annual rate of return of the underlying investments before fees.

inputs.label: Annual Fee
inputs.businessContext: The annual management fee deducted from the account balance.

formulas.futureValue: initialBalance * Math.pow(1 + netRate, years) + (netRate === 0 ? annualContribution * years : annualContribution * ((Math.pow(1 + netRate, years) - 1) / netRate))
